_readme: ics_feeds: any public iCal/ICS calendar feed (venue, city, church, library — look for a 'Subscribe/Export .ics' link); events land in live-events.json nightly. category must be one of: music, food, arts, outdoors, sports, family, market, nightlife, festival. rss_feeds: DFW publication article feeds shown in the site's press wire (headlines, not event rows). CultureMap Dallas and Visit Dallas publish no machine-readable feeds as of 2026-07; their events can arrive via the Google Sheet or any ICS they add later.
